title: SoulLight
description: Light up with the soul of your enemies.
body:
---

<font size="7">**REQUIERES [BJORNLIB 1.0.11+](https://modrinth.com/mod/bjornlib)**</font>

---

# Soul Reaper


![SOULREAPER ENCHANTMENT](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/pyK6JwmB/images/c6cb3de204e7c567a9ea88b23d16ba44789c0066.png)

<font size="5">**With the new Soul Reaper enchantment you will be able to reap the souls of your enemies to use them as a source of light in your buildings.**</font>

<font size="5">**The enchantment can only be found in mineshafts.**</font>

# Soul

![SOUL BLOCK](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/pyK6JwmB/images/c204b914875f65b8fa9c326909865322712f85ed.png)

<font size="5">**Souls can be placed on the ground to illuminate, you can fuel a soul with more souls to increase its size and enlarge the area of light.**</font>

# Soul Torch

![SOUL TORCH](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/pyK6JwmB/images/47fe72593772e4b8a44c5a8d5043085b905b5c52.png)

<font size="5">**You can use the souls to craft a soul torch.**</font>

# Brazier

![BRAZIER](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/pyK6JwmB/images/84585e652cc981ae8df53c5a663b95a2048ce861.png)

![BRAZIER RECIPE](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/pyK6JwmB/images/5f9377825eb5afc1f2d762009d9ed80de31670bc.png)

<font size="5">**You can craft a brazier to place the souls in it.**</font>

# Soul Glass

![SOUL GLASS](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/pyK6JwmB/images/93c9271e89c476ee4edfaff7398997754d7e5cc9.png)

<font size="5">**You can right click with a soul on a glass to place it inside**</font>

# Wisp

![WISP](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/pyK6JwmB/images/c9a708b393ec933db1cbc6ce9c80857c14eb949f.png)

<font size="5">**Wisp have a small chance to appear when killing a living being, killing a wisp will give you a soul.**</font>

# Color

![SOUL COLOR PICKER](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/pyK6JwmB/images/c44768f04ca5a8b75700156216f72b87bb8cf67e.png)

<font size="5">**By pressing shift and right click with a soul or a soul torch having some dye in the inventory you can change the color to the one you want.**</font>
